name: AI Era Corp.
business: AI Era Corp. is an intellectual property and movie investment and licensing firm, focused on acquisitions and development of various intellectual property, including the acquisition and distribution of movies and TV shows. It also licenses its NFT MMM platform, runs a physical movie theater in New York, and provides marketing and consulting services in the media industry.

exposures.sentence: The Company retained the ownership and copyright of the NFT MMM platform, including the APP NFT MMM, and the website: stareastnet.io.
The planned AI-generated content production through ufilm AI IP, which has not yet commenced, is currently in the testing phase and is expected to be adopted and initiated in December 2025.
On May 5, 2022, we incorporated AB Cinemas NY, Inc. in New York, NY, for the purpose of operating the Mt. Kisco Theatre. The theatre started operations in October 2022.

Revenue from consulting services... The Company also provides AI-based solutions and project oversight services that enhance content market accuracy, personalization, and advertising monetization for short drama platforms.

catalysts.sentence: On January 27, 2025, the ABQQ.tv was sold to a third party.

catalysts.event: Termination of NFT MMM license agreement
catalysts.sentence: The agreement was terminated on January 31, 2025.

catalysts.event: New NFT MMM license agreement start
catalysts.sentence: Subsequent to the license renewal on June 1, 2025, we continued licensing the NFT MMM platform to the same party from June 1, 2025 until May 31, 2026 for a monthly license fee of $50,000.

catalysts.event: Contribution agreement with AI+ Hubs Corp (initial)
catalysts.sentence: On May 5, 2025 (the Effective Date), we entered into a Contribution Agreement (the 'Contribution Agreement') with AI+ Hubs Corp, a Delaware corporation ('AI+ Hubs') and newly formed wholly owned subsidiary.

catalysts.event: Decision not to exercise contribution agreement
catalysts.sentence: As of 31 May, 2025, the company and its subsidiary AI+ Hubs Corp decided not to exercise contribution agreement.

catalysts.event: Revised contribution agreement with AI+ Hubs
catalysts.sentence: On June 1, 2025 (the Effective Date), we entered into a revised agreement with AI+ Hubs.
Starting from June 1, 2025, the operations of the Company were transferred to its wholly-owned subsidiaries, AI+ Hubs and AB Cinemas NY, Inc.

catalysts.event: Acquisition of ufilm AI IP (original agreement)
catalysts.sentence: Also on May 5, 2025, the Company entered into an agreement to acquire a license to intellectual property (IP) of ufilm from AIHUB Releasing, Inc. for total consideration of $2,000,000.

catalysts.event: Amendment to ufilm acquisition (settlement via NFT transfer)
catalysts.sentence: On June 2, 2025, the parties mutually agreed to amend the terms of the agreement. Under the revised terms, the company fully settled the purchase consideration by transferring its NFT MMM intellectual property, to the AIHUB Releasing, Inc.

catalysts.event: Further amendment to ufilm acquisition (cash consideration)
catalysts.sentence: On July 12, 2025, the parties mutually further agreed to modify the terms of the agreement. Under the amended terms, the Company agreed to acquire all rights to the ufilm AI IP from AIHUB Releasing, Inc. for a cash consideration of $300,000, replacing the originally agreed transfer of the Company's NFT MMM IP.

catalysts.event: Approval of reverse stock split and name change
catalysts.sentence: On June 5, 2025, the Board of Directors of the Company approved the granting of discretionary authority to the Board of Directors of the Company, at any time or times for a period of 12 months after the date of the written consent, to adopt an amendment to our articles of incorporation to effect a reverse split of our issued and outstanding common stock, par value $0.001 per share, in a range of not less than 1-for-2,000 and not more than 1-for-20,000.

catalysts.event: Expected adoption and initiation of AI-generated content production
catalysts.sentence: The planned AI-generated content production through ufilm AI IP, which has not yet commenced, is currently in the testing phase and is expected to be adopted and initiated in December 2025.
